products.eduxgen_desc: Generate complete lesson plans, questions and assessments in minutes using artificial intelligence.
products.myclass_desc: Complete task management and pedagogical monitoring system for teachers and managers.

products.heading: A family of products for the entire educational journey
products.sub: From AI content generation to live streaming, we have the right tool for every moment.

hero.subtitle: Over 9 million students and 350K teachers across Brazil trust Realms to power learning with technology.

contact_page.hero_tagline: Get in Touch — We're here to help
contact_page.hero_description: Have a question, want to schedule a demo or explore a partnership? Our team responds within 24 hours.
contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact_page.success_sub: Our team will be in touch shortly.
contact_page.response_desc: Our team responds to all messages within 24 hours on business days.
contact_page.faq1_q: How does the free demo work?
contact_page.faq1_a: Just fill out the form requesting a demo. A Realms specialist will get back to you within 24h to schedule a personalized presentation for your institution.
contact_page.faq2_a: Yes! We have special plans for public school networks. Contact us to learn about pricing and conditions for your district or city.
contact_page.faq3_a: Basic implementation takes 5 to 10 business days. Larger projects with custom integrations can take 4 to 8 weeks, with dedicated support throughout.
contact_page.faq4_q: Do you offer support in Portuguese?
contact_page.faq4_a: Yes, all support is provided in Portuguese (PT-BR) and English via chat, email and phone on business days.

about_page.hero_description: An EdTech company founded by passionate educators, dedicated to transforming Brazilian education with cutting-edge technology. Over 20 years connecting teachers, students and institutions.
about_page.timeline_sub: From a classroom dream to a platform that impacts millions of lives.
about_page.tl_2004_desc: We were born in São Paulo with the mission to bring technology to Brazilian classrooms.
about_page.tl_2008_desc: We reached 100 thousand active students and expanded to 5 states across Brazil.
about_page.tl_2014_desc: Brazil's first AI-powered educational content generation platform.
about_page.tl_2018_desc: The IP.TV solution reached 10 thousand simultaneous classrooms nationwide.
about_page.tl_2021_desc: We brought our solutions to more than 8 countries across Latin America.
about_page.tl_2024_desc: Reached 9 million active students — the largest EdTech ecosystem in Brazil.
about_page.val_innovation_desc: We create technology that redefines possibilities and anticipates the future of education.
about_page.val_access_desc: Quality education should be within reach for everyone, regardless of context.
about_page.val_impact_desc: Every decision is measured by the real impact it generates in teachers' and students' lives.
about_page.val_excellence_desc: We never stop improving — today's best is tomorrow's starting point.
about_page.team_sub: A group of visionaries passionate about education and technology.
about_page.cta_sub: Discover how Realms can empower your institution and change the lives of your students.

about.heading: Built by educators, for educators
about.body1: Realms was born from the belief that technology should amplify human potential — not replace it. With over 20 years of EdTech experience, we build tools that put teachers at the center.
about.body2: Our mission is simple: give educators superpowers with AI, so they can do more in less time and engage students like never before.

testimonials.heading: Those who use it, approve it

home.products_subtitle: Innovative educational technology solutions built for the future of learning
home.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of educators and students already using our platform

footer.tagline: Transforming education with technology for over 20 years.

eduxgen.hero_subtitle: AI-powered educational content generation platform for educators and institutions
eduxgen.content_text: EduXGen.ai leverages cutting-edge artificial intelligence to generate personalized educational content at scale. From lesson plans to assessments, our AI writes it all.

myclass.hero_subtitle: Complete classroom management and collaborative learning solution
myclass.content_text: MyClass provides teachers and students with all the tools needed for effective remote and in-person learning — from live sessions to assignments, grades and more.

personas.hero_subtitle: Personalized adaptive learning journeys for every student
personas.content_text: Realms Personas creates unique learning profiles that adapt to each student's pace, style, and goals — delivering hyper-personalized educational pathways.

eduxrealms.hero_subtitle: Immersive educational environments powered by 3D and gamification
eduxrealms.content_text: EduxRealms brings education to life through interactive 3D environments and gamified learning experiences that captivate and engage students.

iptv.content_text: Deliver high-quality educational content through IPTV infrastructure to reach students everywhere — including areas with limited internet connectivity.

conteudo.hero_subtitle: Partnership with Smile and Learn offering K-12 multimedia content
conteudo.content_text: In partnership with Smile and Learn, we offer an extensive library of multimedia educational content covering the entire school journey, from kindergarten through high school.
conteudo.cta_text: Bring rich and engaging content to every student, on any device, with expert K-12 curation.

about.hero_subtitle: Our story, mission and the values that drive us
about.content_text: We are a leading EdTech company dedicated to transforming education through innovative technology solutions. Our team of passionate engineers, educators, and designers work together to make learning more effective and accessible for everyone.
about.mission_text: To democratize high-quality education by putting powerful technology in the hands of educators and learners worldwide.
about.vision_text: A world where every learner has access to personalized, high-quality education regardless of location or background.

press.hero_subtitle: Latest news, announcements and media coverage
press.content_text: Stay up to date with our latest news, press releases, and media appearances. For press inquiries, please contact our communications team.

contact.hero_subtitle: Get in touch — we'd love to hear from you
